metadata.name: 02_意图识别分流
metadata.description: 演示使用大模型做意图分类，并走向不同下游分支

graph_json: {"elements": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "position": {"x": 100, "y": 200}, "data": {"config": {"inputVariables": ["user_input"]}}, "label": "开始"}, {"id": "node_intent", "type": "intent_classifier", "position": {"x": 350, "y": 200}, "data": {"config": {"modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "intents": [{"name": "闲聊", "description": "日常打招呼、闲聊", "value": "chat", "targetRoute": "node_chat"}, {"name": "查询天气", "description": "询问天气状况", "value": "weather", "targetRoute": "node_weather"}], "inputVariable": "{user_input}", "outputVariable": "intent_result"}}, "label": "意图识别"}, {"id": "node_chat", "type": "llm", "position": {"x": 650, "y": 100}, "data": {"config": {"modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "promptTemplate": "用户：{user_input}\\n你是一个幽默的朋友，请回复。", "outputFormat": "text", "outputVariable": "chat_reply"}}, "label": "闲聊回复"}, {"id": "node_weather", "type": "tool_executor", "position": {"x": 650, "y": 300}, "data": {"config": {"toolCode": "mock_weather_api", "argumentsJson": "{\"location\": \"北京\"}", "outputVariable": "weather_info"}}, "label": "天气查询(Mock)"}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "position": {"x": 950, "y": 200}, "data": {"config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "reply", "type": "string", "value": "{chat_reply}{weather_info}", "children": []}]}}, "label": "结束"}, {"id": "edge_node_start_node_intent", "type": "default", "source": "node_start", "target": "node_intent", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_intent_node_chat_intent_0", "type": "default", "source": "node_intent", "target": "node_chat", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}, "sourceHandle": "intent_0"}, {"id": "edge_node_intent_node_weather_intent_1", "type": "default", "source": "node_intent", "target": "node_weather", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}, "sourceHandle": "intent_1"}, {"id": "edge_node_chat_node_end", "type": "default", "source": "node_chat", "target": "node_end", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_weather_node_end", "type": "default", "source": "node_weather", "target": "node_end", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}], "nodes": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "name": "开始", "config": {"inputVariables": ["user_input"]}}, {"id": "node_intent", "type": "intent_classifier", "name": "意图识别", "config": {"modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "intents": [{"name": "闲聊", "description": "日常打招呼、闲聊", "value": "chat", "targetRoute": "node_chat"}, {"name": "查询天气", "description": "询问天气状况", "value": "weather", "targetRoute": "node_weather"}], "inputVariable": "{user_input}", "outputVariable": "intent_result"}}, {"id": "node_chat", "type": "llm", "name": "闲聊回复", "config": {"modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "promptTemplate": "用户：{user_input}\\n你是一个幽默的朋友，请回复。", "outputFormat": "text", "outputVariable": "chat_reply"}}, {"id": "node_weather", "type": "tool_executor", "name": "天气查询(Mock)", "config": {"toolCode": "mock_weather_api", "argumentsJson": "{\"location\": \"北京\"}", "outputVariable": "weather_info"}}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "name": "结束", "config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "reply", "type": "string", "value": "{chat_reply}{weather_info}", "children": []}]}}], "edges": [{"source": "node_start", "target": "node_intent", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_intent", "target": "node_chat", "type": "default", "condition": "", "sourceHandle": "intent_0"}, {"source": "node_intent", "target": "node_weather", "type": "default", "condition": "", "sourceHandle": "intent_1"}, {"source": "node_chat", "target": "node_end", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_weather", "target": "node_end", "type": "default", "condition":
